transcript: Thank you to all the American people who vote for us. This is a dream, a dream coming true. And we are so happy that today we won this AGT Fantasy League. This means our dreams coming true and our life is changing. The AGT Fantasy League champion is... The Ramadani brothers! We practice eight hours per day. Every day we practice and we were thought like we just wasting our time but no. Someday somewhere people will see we love it and it's going to wasting our time. But no, someday, somewhere, people will see, will love it, and it's going to change our life. And here, America, our life is changed from today. I am so proud of you. I am so proud. What you do is so dangerous, so inspiring, and you deserve this. You are superstars. Thank you, everybody. Thank you, America! Inspiring and you deserve this you are superstars
